name: Scout Gaming Group AB (publ)
summary: Scout Gaming Group AB (publ) provides B2B daily fantasy sports and pool betting solutions in Sweden, Norway, Ukraine, and Malta. It offers a network based fantasy sports solution with support for various sports and leagues through an in-house StatCenter, which provides real-time information, including data pricing of players, odds setting, and squad maintenance to players, as well as Betflex, a solution that analyses player's behavior. The company was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
